case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCICO/TREASURER & VS. YSVETTELANA KOLIMLIM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER REPRESENTED BY JOANNE ADAMS. DEFENDANT YSVETTELANA KOLIMLIM DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED OCT-24-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KOLIMLIM, YSVETTELANA

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCICO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR. AS TO DEFENDANT KOLIMLIM, YSVETTELANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCICO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCICO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOLIMLIM, YSVETTELANA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCICO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR. AS TO DEFENDANT KOLIMLIM, YSVETTELANA
